heading: Announcement of payment for broadcast
label: 317 Announcement of payment for broadcast
notes: Amendments1980—Subsec. (b). conformed the reference to to reflect the renumbering of that section by .Pub. L. 96–507section 508 of this titlePub. L. 96–5071960— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserting proviso clause, and added subsecs. (b) to (e).Pub. L. 86–752
amendments: Amendments1980—Subsec. (b). conformed the reference to to reflect the renumbering of that section by .Pub. L. 96–507section 508 of this titlePub. L. 96–5071960— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserting proviso clause, and added subsecs. (b) to (e).Pub. L. 86–752

children.text: All matter broadcast by any radio station for which any money, service or other valuable consideration is directly or indirectly paid, or promised to or charged or accepted by, the station so broadcasting, from any person, shall, at the time the same is so broadcast, be announced as paid for or furnished, as the case may be, by such person: , That “service or other valuable consideration” shall not include any service or property furnished without charge or at a nominal charge for use on, or in connection with, a broadcast unless it is so furnished in consideration for an identification in a broadcast of any person, product, service, trademark, or brand name beyond an identification which is reasonably related to the use of such service or property on the broadcast.Provided

Nothing in this section shall preclude the Commission from requiring that an appropriate announcement shall be made at the time of the broadcast in the case of any political program or any program involving the discussion of any controversial issue for which any films, records, transcriptions, talent, scripts, or other material or service of any kind have been furnished, without charge or at a nominal charge, directly or indirectly, as an inducement to the broadcast of such program.

children.heading: Disclosure to station of payments
children.label: b Disclosure to station of payments
children.text: In any case where a report has been made to a radio station, as required by , of circumstances which would have required an announcement under this section had the consideration been received by such radio station, an appropriate announcement shall be made by such radio station.section 508 of this title

children.heading: Acquiring information from station employees
children.label: c Acquiring information from station employees
children.text: The licensee of each radio station shall exercise reasonable diligence to obtain from its employees, and from other persons with whom it deals directly in connection with any program or program matter for broadcast, information to enable such licensee to make the announcement required by this section.

children.heading: Waiver of announcement
children.label: d Waiver of announcement
children.text: The Commission may waive the requirement of an announcement as provided in this section in any case or class of cases with respect to which it determines that the public interest, convenience, or necessity does not require the broadcasting of such announcement.

children.heading: Rules and regulations
children.label: e Rules and regulations
children.text: The Commission shall prescribe appropriate rules and regulations to carry out the provisions of this section.
